title: Optimized polyepitope neoantigen DNA vaccines elicit neoantigen-specific immune responses in preclinical models and in clinical translation
indication_summary: Optimized polyepitope neoantigen DNA vaccine tested in preclinical mouse breast cancer models (E0771, 4T1.2) and an HLA-A2 model-antigen system, plus clinical translation in one patient with metastatic pancreatic neuroendocrine tumor.

patients.quoted_text: We first established a model system to optimize the polyepitope DNA vaccine platform by using eight well-characterized HLA-A2-restricted epitopes.
patients.section_ref: Results: Optimizing the design of polyepitope neoantigen DNA vaccines
patients.indication: HLA-A2 model-antigen optimization (viral and gp100 epitopes)
patients.vaccine_platform_detail: polyepitope model-antigen DNA vaccine (Ubmut-P20), 8 HLA-A2-restricted epitopes; gene gun (Helios), 4 ug x3 (days 0,3,6)

patients.quoted_text: Neoantigen-specific T cell responses were detected by IFN-γ ELISpot assay for three neoantigens (Lrrc27 G330A, Plekho1 P251S, and Pttg1 V53L) encoded in the Ubmut-E0771 polyepitope DNA vaccine (Fig. 2a).

provenance.quoted_text: three neoantigens (Lrrc27 G330A, Plekho1 P251S, and Pttg1 V53L)

patients.vaccine_platform_detail: Ubmut-E0771 polyepitope neoantigen DNA vaccine; gene gun (Helios), 4 ug x3 (days 0,3,6)

preclinical_efficacy.note: polyepitope Ubmut-E0771 DNA vaccine alone had only a marginal impact on E0771 tumor growth in either prophylactic or therapeutic settings (data not shown)

source.quoted_text: polyepitope Ubmut-E0771 DNA vaccine alone, in either prophylactic or therapeutic settings, had only a marginal impact on subcutaneously transplanted E0771 tumor growth

preclinical_efficacy.note: combined with anti-PD-L1 ICB suppressed E0771 tumor growth for the duration of the experiment; persistent neoantigen-specific T cells at day 26 only with anti-PD-L1

source.quoted_text: the polyepitope Ubmut-E0771 neoantigen DNA vaccine was able to enhance the antitumor response and suppress E0771 tumor growth

patients.quoted_text: Neoantigen-specific T cell responses were also detected by IFN-γ ELISpot assay for four neoantigens (Gyk K505R, Gpld1 R829W, Pram1 Q572L and Aars2 A697P) encoded in the Ubmut-4T1.2 polyepitope DNA vaccine (Fig. 2b).

provenance.quoted_text: four neoantigens (Gyk K505R, Gpld1 R829W, Pram1 Q572L and Aars2 A697P)

patients.vaccine_platform_detail: Ubmut-4T1.2 polyepitope neoantigen DNA vaccine; gene gun (Helios), 4 ug x3 (days 0,3,6)

preclinical_efficacy.note: Ubmut-4T1.2 polyepitope DNA vaccine alone partially inhibited tumor growth in vivo in a pilot study (Fig. S3b); 4T1.2 is resistant to anti-PD-L1 monotherapy (Fig. S3a)

source.quoted_text: Ubmut-4T1.2 polyepitope DNA vaccine alone was able to partially inhibit tumor growth in vivo

patients.quoted_text: For this patient, 13 neoantigens were targeted by the DNA vaccine. Specific responses above background were demonstrated against three neoantigens (TBC1D22A:p.R437S, TRPC4AP:p.T63M, and ZNF611:p.D404G, Fig. 5).

provenance.quoted_text: 13 neoantigens were targeted by the DNA vaccine. Specific responses above background were demonstrated against three neoantigens

patients.indication: Metastatic pancreatic neuroendocrine tumor (Lynch syndrome-associated, microsatellite instability-high)
patients.vaccine_platform_detail: pGTB16 polyepitope neoantigen DNA vaccine; intramuscular electroporation (TDS-IM, Ichor Medical Systems); 3 vaccinations >=21 days apart; GMP-manufactured

source.quoted_text: Because his tumor demonstrated microsatellite instability, he was also treated with pembrolizumab as maintenance therapy on a compassionate use protocol with a partial response.
He received palliative carboplatin/etoposide and concurrent lanreotide with a partial response.
He received palliative carboplatin/etoposide and concurrent lanreotide with a partial response.

evidence.quoted_text: DNA vaccines induced G209-specific immune response in HHD II mice was measured by an IFN-γ ELISpot assay (mean ± SEM, n = 8)

provenance.quoted_text: G209-specific immune response in HHD II mice

magnitude.raw: G209-specific IFN-γ ELISpot response in Ubmut-P20-vaccinated HHD II mice (Fig. 1c); per-group SFU value not tabulated

source.quoted_text: DNA vaccines induced G209-specific immune response

curator_notes.text: Patient GTB16 (P4) concomitant_therapy entries (pembrolizumab, carboplatin/etoposide, lanreotide) were PRIOR treatment lines; the neoantigen DNA vaccine was given as monotherapy on a compassionate-use basis after progression. timing=sequential is the closest Literal for prior-line therapy. msi_status=msi_high from 'Lynch Syndrome-associated' + 'his tumor demonstrated microsatellite instability'.
